subcodes.first_line: These [the Ruby Tablet and the fifth Tablet of Paradise] are the Tablets of the Kingdom which have been recorded by the Supreme Pen in the Preserved Tablet...What is meant is that unless man knoweth God, he will remain deprived of knowing his own self. First and foremost it is incumbent upon man to apprehend the light of the Sun
subcodes.first_line_orig: این الواح ملکوتست که از قلم اعلی در لوح محفوظ مرقومست چنین الواحی از عالم
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @knowledge of self, @Greatest Name
